use_cases: Submit forms and trigger actions in web applications
Navigate between pages or sections within an interface
Trigger modal dialogs, popovers, or other overlay components
Toggle states or switch between options in settings
Handle user interactions in payment and checkout flows
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI and styled with Tailwind CSS using class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings and disabled states. Serves as a fundamental UI building block for any web application interface.
